nasb.text: For the west side there were hangings of fifty cubits with their ten pillars and their ten sockets; the hooks of the pillars and their bands were of silver.

esv.text: And for the west side were hangings of fifty cubits, their ten pillars, and their ten bases; the hooks of the pillars and their fillets were of silver.

cnv.text: 西面，有幔幕二十二公尺，幔幕的柱子有十根，柱座有十個；柱鉤和橫柱閂是銀做的。

ccb.text: 西面的帷幔宽二十三米，有十根柱子和十个带凹槽的底座，钩子和横杆都是银的。
